name: Lieutenant Kess
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, city scout lieutenant in hooded cloak, rain beading on leather, watchfort silhouette behind, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: We don’t have an army for this. We have you.

nodes.text:
That watchfort used to be ours. Now it’s a relay hub.

Steal their signal book, free our people, and cut the banner captain out of the chain.

If you’re seen, the siege line will learn the postern gate exists.

name: Sergeant Bram
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, bruised sergeant in torn tabard behind iron bars, stubborn eyes, torchlit pen, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: If you’re real, cut these bars. If you’re not, stop wasting my breath.

nodes.text:
The banner captain lives in the relay tower.

There’s a hidden sally hatch behind the armory rack—old city workmanship.

And there’s a troll on a chain. Don’t fight it in open ground.
